ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
--  TTS Discord 음성채널 이동 모듈
--  사용법:
--    1. HOST_TOKEN 에 발급받은 토큰 입력
--    2. BOT_URL 에 Railway 서버 URL 입력
--    3. 세션 시작 시 DiscordBridge.startSession() 호출
--    4. 이동 시    DiscordBridge.movePlayer(steamId, discordId, targetKey) 호출
--       targetKey: "main" | "private1" | "private2" | "private3" | "private4"
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

DiscordBridge = {}
switchToggle = 0
currentPage = 0
connectClickPColor = nil
HOST_TOKEN = ""
BOT_URL    = "https://hsautomove-production.up.railway.app"
SAVED_TOKEN = ""
isCMMT = false

roomPCColors = {}
roomPCColors[1] = {}
roomPCColors[2] = {}
roomPCColors[3] = {}
roomPCColors[4] = {}
roomPCColors[5] = {}
PCNameOfColor = {}

-- 세션 데이터 (startSession 후 채워짐)
sessionData = {
    hostSteamId   = nil,
    hostDiscordId = nil,
    channels      = {},   -- { main, private1, private2, private3, private4 }
    players       = {},   -- [ { discord_id, nickname } ]
}

function onLoad(script_state)
    if script_state ~= nil then
        local state = JSON.decode(script_state)
        if state ~= nil and state.st_saved_token ~= nil then
            SAVED_TOKEN = state.st_saved_token
        end
    end
    self.addContextMenuItem("토큰 저장하기", itemAction1)
    self.addContextMenuItem("토큰 초기화", itemAction2)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {st_saved_token = SAVED_TOKEN}
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function itemAction1(player_color, menu_position)
    Player[player_color].showInputDialog("저장할 유저 토큰 입력",
        function (text, player_color2)
            SAVED_TOKEN = text
            if Player[player_color2].seated == true then
                broadcastToColor('토큰을 저장했습니다.', player_color2)
            end
        end
    )
end
function itemAction2(player_color, menu_position)
    SAVED_TOKEN = ''
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('저장된 토큰이 초기화되었습니다.', player_color)
    end
end


function connectToDiscord(player, value, id)
    if player.color == 'Grey' then return end
    
    if SAVED_TOKEN == '' then
        player.showInputDialog("유저 토큰 입력",
        function (text, player_color)
            if player_color == 'Grey' then
                broadcastToAll('Grey 색상에서는 연동할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            if currentPage == 0 then
                currentPage = 1
                HOST_TOKEN = text
                connectClickPColor = player_color
                DiscordBridge.startSession()
            end
        end
        )
    else
        if currentPage == 0 then
            currentPage = 1
            HOST_TOKEN = SAVED_TOKEN
            connectClickPColor = player.color
            DiscordBridge.startSession()
        end
    end
end

-- ── 내부 유틸 ────────────────────────────────────────

function initialization()
    roomPCColors = {}
    roomPCColors[1] = {}
    roomPCColors[2] = {}
    roomPCColors[3] = {}
    roomPCColors[4] = {}
    roomPCColors[5] = {}
    PCNameOfColor = {}
    
    Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
    self.UI.setAttribute('step1', 'active', 'true')
    self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'active', 'false')
    currentPage = 0
    switchToggle = 0
    self.UI.setAttribute('switchbt', 'color', '#FF7777')
    self.UI.setAttribute('switchbt', 'text', '스위치:OFF')
    sessionData.hostSteamId   = nil
    sessionData.hostDiscordId = nil
    sessionData.channels      = {}   -- { main, private1, private2, private3, private4 }
    sessionData.players       = {}   -- [ { discord_id, nickname } ]
    for i = 1, 10 do 
        self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(i), '')
        self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'text', '사용자명 매칭')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'color', '#FFFFFF')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
    end
    setNameList()
end

local function postJSON(endpoint, body, callback)
    local url = BOT_URL .. endpoint
    local headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" }
    WebRequest.custom(url, "POST", true, JSON.encode(body), headers, function(resp)
        if resp.is_error then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 요청 오류: " .. resp.error, {r=1,g=0,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        local ok, data = pcall(JSON.decode, resp.text)
        if not ok then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 응답 파싱 오류", {r=1,g=0,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        if data.error then
            broadcastToAll("[Discord] 서버 오류: " .. data.error, {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
            initialization()
            return
        end
        callback(data)
    end)
end

-- ── 공개 API ─────────────────────────────────────────

--- 세션 시작 (호스트 인증 + 데이터 수신)
--- 성공 시 onSessionReady(data) 호출됨
function DiscordBridge.startSession()
    postJSON("/auth", { token = HOST_TOKEN }, function(data)
        sessionData.hostSteamId   = data.host_steam_id
        sessionData.hostDiscordId = data.host_discord_id
        sessionData.channels      = data.channels
        sessionData.players       = data.players
        
        if onSessionReady then
            onSessionReady(sessionData)
        else
            Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
            currentPage = 0
        end
    end)
end

steamIdToDiscordId = {}
discordNameToId = {}
discordNameList = {}
steamIdList = {}
steamNameList = {}

function onSessionReady(sdata)
    steamIdToDiscordId = {}
    discordNameToId = {}
    discordNameList = {}
    steamIdList = {}
    steamNameList = {}
    
    local gui = Global.UI.getXml()
    if string.find(gui, [=[id="Room1PC1"]=]) and string.find(gui, [=[onClick="moveBtClick"]=]) then
        isCMMT = true
    else
        isCMMT = false
        initializeGlobalUI()
    end

    if Player[connectClickPColor].steam_id ~= sessionData.hostSteamId then
        broadcastToAll('올바른 토큰 사용자가 아닙니다.')
        initialization()
        return
    else
        setConsoleVisibility(connectClickPColor)
    end

    for i = 1, 10 do 
        self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(i), '')
        self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'text', '사용자명 매칭')
        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
    end
    -- 호스트 엔트리 제거
    for i = #sdata.players, 1, -1 do
        if sdata.players[i].discord_id == sdata.hostDiscordId then
            table.remove(sdata.players, i)
            break
        end
    end
    
    
    if sdata.hostSteamId == nil or sdata.hostDiscordId == nil or sdata.channels.main == nil or sdata.channels.private1 == nil or sdata.channels.private2 == nil or sdata.channels.private3 == nil or sdata.channels.private4 == nil then
        Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', nil)
        broadcastToAll("연동 실패", {r=1,g=0,b=0})
        if sdata.channels.main == nil then
            broadcastToAll("메인방 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private1 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방1 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private2 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방2 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private3 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방3 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        if sdata.channels.private4 == nil then
            broadcastToAll("밀담방4 찾을 수 없음")
        end
        initialization()
        return
    end
    -- print(sdata.hostSteamId)
    -- print(sdata.hostDiscordId)
    -- print(sdata.channels.main)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private1)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private2)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private3)
    -- print(sdata.channels.private4)
    for i = #sdata.players, 1, -1 do
        discordNameToId[sdata.players[i].nickname] = sdata.players[i].discord_id
        discordNameList[#discordNameList + 1] = sdata.players[i].nickname
    end
    
    local pls = Player.getPlayers()
    for i = 1, #pls do
        if pls[i].color ~= 'Grey' then
            if pls[i].steam_id == sdata.hostSteamId then
                steamIdToDiscordId[pls[i].steam_id] = sdata.hostDiscordId
            else
                steamNameList[#steamNameList + 1] = pls[i].steam_name
                steamIdList[#steamIdList + 1] = pls[i].steam_id
                self.UI.setValue('steamMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), pls[i].steam_name)
                self.UI.setAttribute('steamMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember'..tostring(#steamNameList), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end
    end

    if isCMMT == true then
        Global.setVar('autoMoveModule', self)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('step1', 'active', 'false')
    self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'active', 'true')
end


function autoMove(params)
    local steamId = params.steamId
    local nextRoom = params.nextRoom
    local tkey
    if nextRoom == 1 then
        tkey = 'main'
    elseif nextRoom == 2 then
        tkey = 'private1'
    elseif nextRoom == 3 then
        tkey = 'private2'
    elseif nextRoom == 4 then
        tkey = 'private3'
    elseif nextRoom == 5 then
        tkey = 'private4'
    else
        return
    end
    autoMovePlayer(steamId, tkey)
end


--- 플레이어를 특정 채널로 이동
--- @param steamId   string  이동시킬 플레이어의 스팀 ID
--- @param targetKey string  "main" | "private1" | "private2" | "private3" | "private4"
function autoMovePlayer(steamId, targetKey)
    if switchToggle == 0 then return end
    local discordId = steamIdToDiscordId[steamId]
    if not discordId or steamIdToDiscordId[steamId] == nil then
        broadcastToAll("매칭되지 않은 플레이어입니다.", {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
        return
    end

    local targetChannelId = sessionData.channels[targetKey]
    if not targetChannelId then
        broadcastToAll("알 수 없는 채널 키 : " .. targetKey, {r=1,g=0.5,b=0})
        return
    end

    postJSON("/move", {
        token             = HOST_TOKEN,
        steam_id          = steamId,
        discord_id        = discordId,
        target_channel_id = targetChannelId,
    }, function(data)
        -- 성공 시 별도 알림 없음 (필요하면 추가)
    end)
end

function setConsoleVisibility(pColor)
    if pColor == 'Grey' then return end
    if Player[pColor].steam_id == sessionData.hostSteamId then
        self.UI.setAttribute('step2', 'visibility', pColor)
    end
end

function onPlayerChangeColor(player_color)
    setConsoleVisibility(player_color)
end

function switch(player, value, id)
    if switchToggle == 0 then
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'color', '#55FF55')
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '스위치:ON')
        switchToggle = 1
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'color', '#FF7777')
        self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '스위치:OFF')
        switchToggle = 0
    end
end

function playerOfId(id)
    local pls = Player.getPlayers()
    for i = 1, #pls do
        if pls[i].steam_id == id then
            return pls[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function pickDiscordUsername(player, value, id)
    local idxStr = string.gsub(id, 'buttonMember', '')
    local idx = tonumber(idxStr)
    player.showOptionsDialog("디스코드 사용자명을 선택하세요", discordNameList, '',
    function (text, index, player_color)
        if text == '' then
            return
        else
            steamIdToDiscordId[steamIdList[idx]] = discordNameToId[text]
            self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. idx, 'text', text)
            Wait.frames(function ()
                testSameName()
            end, 50)
        end
    end
    )
end

function entrust(player, value, id)
    broadcastToAll('디스코드 사용자명을 각 플레이어가 스스로 매칭합니다.')
    for i = 1, #steamIdList do
        local pl = playerOfId(steamIdList[i])
        if pl ~= nil then
            pl.showOptionsDialog("디스코드 사용자명을 선택하세요", discordNameList, '',
                function(text, index, player_color)
                    if text == '' then
                        return
                    else
                        steamIdToDiscordId[steamIdList[i]] = discordNameToId[text]
                        self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text', text)
                        Wait.frames(function ()
                            testSameName()
                        end, 50)
                    end
                end
            )
        end
    end
end

function testSameName()
    for i = 1, 10 do
        local currentName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text')
        if currentName ~= '사용자명 매칭' then
            self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'color', '#00FF00')
        end
    end
    for i = 1, 10 do
        local currentName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'text')
        if currentName ~= '사용자명 매칭' then
            for j = i + 1, 10 do
                local compareName = self.UI.getAttribute('buttonMember' .. j, 'text')
                if currentName == compareName then
                    self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. i, 'color', '#FF0000')
                    self.UI.setAttribute('buttonMember' .. j, 'color', '#FF0000')
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

hexColor = {}
hexColor['White'] = '#FFFFFF'
hexColor['Brown'] = '#865432'
hexColor['Red'] = '#DA1A18'
hexColor['Orange'] = '#F4641D'
hexColor['Yellow'] = '#E7E52C'
hexColor['Green'] = '#31B32B'
hexColor['Teal'] = '#21B19B'
hexColor['Blue'] = '#1E87FF'
hexColor['Purple'] = '#A93CEC'
hexColor['Pink'] = '#F570CE'
hexColor['Grey'] = '#808080'
hexColor['Black'] = '#00FF00'

function self_moveBtClick(player, value, id)
    if isCMMT == false and switchToggle == 1 then
        local roomcd = string.gsub(id, 'AMMoveBtTo', '')
        local roomno = tonumber(roomcd)
        if player.color ~= 'Black' and player.color ~= 'Grey' then
            if PCNameOfColor[player.color] == nil then
                PCNameOfColor[player.color] = player.color
            end
            for r = 1, 5 do
                removeByValue(roomPCColors[r], player.color)
            end
            if roomno ~= nil then
                table.insert(roomPCColors[roomno], player.color)
            end
        end
        if roomno ~= nil then
            autoMove({steamId = player.steam_id, nextRoom = roomno})
        end
        setNameList()
    end
end

function setNameList()
    if isCMMT == true then return end
    for r = 1, 5 do
        Global.UI.setValue('roomPCNames' .. r, '')
        local tmpstr = ''
        if roomPCColors[r] ~= nil then
            for p = 1, #roomPCColors[r] do
                if roomPCColors[r][p] ~= nil then
                    tmpstr = tmpstr .. [=[<textcolor color="]=] .. hexColor[roomPCColors[r][p]] .. [=[">]=]
                    tmpstr = tmpstr .. '[' .. PCNameOfColor[roomPCColors[r][p]] .. '] '
                    tmpstr = tmpstr .. [=[</textcolor>]=]
                end
            end
        end
        Global.UI.setValue('roomPCNames' .. r, tmpstr)
    end
end

UI_initialized = 0
function initializeGlobalUI()
    if isCMMT == true then return end
    local gui = Global.UI.getXml()
    if string.find(gui, [=[AMcontrolPanel]=]) and string.find(gui, [=[self_moveBtClick]=]) then
       UI_initialized = 1
    end
    if UI_initialized == 0 then
        UI_initialized = 1
 
        local addGUI = [===[

<Panel id='AMcontrolPanel' active="true" visibility="Black|White|Brown|Red|Orange|Yellow|Green|Teal|Blue|Purple|Pink|Grey" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/18057664179699419431/6D05435D1CBADEAFD0900153BCA6728FEA122D8C/"
width="1100" height="1500" scale="0.28 0.28 0.28" color="#FFFFFF88" rectAlignment="MiddleLeft" offsetXY="50 230" allowDragging="true" returnToOriginalPositionWhenReleased="false"
restrictDraggingToParentBounds="false">

<Image offsetXY="-280 490"
width="300" height="260" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/11843112479545728451/038AC19B08CB4C9DC8B1F64728EA85A32BB2DD06/"/>
<Image offsetXY="-280 170"
width="300" height="150" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17986562321779201154/9D9D126143813F55A4D411E8F758BC22D36E16F6/"/>
<Image offsetXY="-280 -75"
width="300" height="150" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17986562321779201154/9D9D126143813F55A4D411E8F758BC22D36E16F6/"/>
<Image offsetXY="-280 -321"
width="300" height="150" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17986562321779201154/9D9D126143813F55A4D411E8F758BC22D36E16F6/"/>
<Image offsetXY="-280 -567"
width="300" height="150" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17986562321779201154/9D9D126143813F55A4D411E8F758BC22D36E16F6/"/>

<Text offsetXY="-280 490" width="300" height="260" fontSize="60" color="#FFFFFF" fontStyle="Normal">메인방</Text>
<Text offsetXY="-280 170" width="300" height="150" fontSize="60" color="#FFFFFF" fontStyle="Normal">밀담방1</Text>
<Text offsetXY="-280 -75" width="300" height="150" fontSize="60" color="#FFFFFF" fontStyle="Normal">밀담방2</Text>
<Text offsetXY="-280 -321" width="300" height="150" fontSize="60" color="#FFFFFF" fontStyle="Normal">밀담방3</Text>
<Text offsetXY="-280 -567" width="300" height="150" fontSize="60" color="#FFFFFF" fontStyle="Normal">밀담방4</Text>

<Text id="roomPCNames1" offsetXY="165 490"  width="570" height="280" fontStyle="Bold" resizeTextForBestFit="true" resizeTextMaxSize="60"></Text>
<Text id="roomPCNames2" offsetXY="165 170"  width="570" height="160" fontStyle="Bold" resizeTextForBestFit="true" resizeTextMaxSize="60"></Text>
<Text id="roomPCNames3" offsetXY="165 -75"  width="570" height="160" fontStyle="Bold" resizeTextForBestFit="true" resizeTextMaxSize="60"></Text>
<Text id="roomPCNames4" offsetXY="165 -321" width="570" height="160" fontStyle="Bold" resizeTextForBestFit="true" resizeTextMaxSize="60"></Text>
<Text id="roomPCNames5" offsetXY="165 -567" width="570" height="160" fontStyle="Bold" resizeTextForBestFit="true" resizeTextMaxSize="60"></Text>


<button id="AMMoveBtTo1" offsetXY="-280 490" width="300" height="260" color="#00000000" onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/self_moveBtClick"/>
<button id="AMMoveBtTo2" offsetXY="-280 170" width="300" height="150" color="#00000000" onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/self_moveBtClick"/>
<button id="AMMoveBtTo3" offsetXY="-280 -75" width="300" height="150" color="#00000000" onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/self_moveBtClick"/>
<button id="AMMoveBtTo4" offsetXY="-280 -321" width="300" height="150" color="#00000000" onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/self_moveBtClick"/>
<button id="AMMoveBtTo5" offsetXY="-280 -567" width="300" height="150" color="#00000000" onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/self_moveBtClick"/>

<button id="changeName" offsetXY="0 805" width="300" height="110" image="https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17986562321779201154/9D9D126143813F55A4D411E8F758BC22D36E16F6/"
onClick="]===] .. self.guid .. [===[/changeName" fontSize="60" textColor="#FFFFBB">이름변경</button>
</Panel>
]===]

        local curGUI = Global.UI.getXml()
        curGUI = curGUI .. addGUI
        Global.UI.setXml(curGUI)
        Wait.frames(function()
            local pls = Player.getPlayers()
            for i = 1, #pls do 
                if pls[i].color ~= 'Grey' and pls[i].color ~= 'Black' then
                    PCNameOfColor[pls[i].color] = pls[i].color
                    table.insert(roomPCColors[1], pls[i].color)
                end
            end
            setNameList()
        end, 20)
    else
        local pls = Player.getPlayers()
        for i = 1, #pls do 
            if pls[i].color ~= 'Grey' and pls[i].color ~= 'Black' then
                PCNameOfColor[pls[i].color] = pls[i].color
                table.insert(roomPCColors[1], pls[i].color)
            end
        end
        setNameList()
    end
end

function removeByValue(t, val)
    for i, v in ipairs(t) do
        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)
            break
        end
    end
end

function changeName(player, value, id)
    if player.color == 'Black' or player.color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    player.showInputDialog("변경할 이름 입력 (기호 입력 금지)",
    function (text, player_color)
        if string.find(text, '<') or string.find(text, '>') or string.find(text, "'")  or string.find(text, '"') or string.find(text, '&') then
            if Player[player_color].seated == true then
                broadcastToColor('기호를 입력할 수 없습니다.', player_color)
            end
            return
        else
            PCNameOfColor[player_color] = text
            setNameList()
        end
    end
    )
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel rotation="0 0 180" position="0 0 -21" scale="0.25 0.25 0.25">

<Panel id="step1">
<Button width="400" height="130" fontSize="70" onClick="connectToDiscord" color="#00DD00">연동하기</Button>
<Text width="500" height="60" offsetXY="0 -90" fontSize="16" color="#FFAA00">모든 플레이어가 색상을 선택한 후 연동해주세요</Text>
<Text width="500" height="60" offsetXY="0 -360" fontSize="16" color="#FFFFFF">우클릭하여 자주 사용하는 토큰 저장 가능</Text>
</Panel>
